name: Tex-Mex Hash
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Pan fry ground beef until light brown in skillet. Drain fat.
3. Add onions and peppers and cook until onion is tender.
4. Stir in the rest of the ingredients and heat until warm.
5. Pour into a casserole dish, cover, and bake for 1 hour.
